examples: She picked up the gauntlet in her incisive keynote address to the conference.
Some of the witnesses had to run the gauntlet of television cameras and reporters.
Luxury car firm Jaguar has thrown down the gauntlet to competitors by giving the best guarantee on the market.
But it may have also thrown down the gauntlet to a different adversary: Microsoft .
Cezanne's death created a vacuum and challenge: Who would or could pick up the great man's gauntlet?
